description: Surface the per-item validation diagnostic on update's blocked path + as a standalone op — closes FGAP-077. Bind the ValidationError resyncSchema's unbound catch discards (index.ts:622): map each AJV error's instancePath (/<arrayKey>/N) to the item id, thread {item id, field, keyword, params, value} per failing item into the update result's blocked entry (structured + CLI text), distinguish the no-chain block from the validation block, and expose the same returns-not-throws per-item validator as a standalone op (validate a block's items against a target schema version -> per-item failures). Builds on TASK-046's in-memory migrate+validate helper.
acceptance_criteria: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
notes: Closes FGAP-077; advances STORY-001/002/003/004/005/009. Depends on TASK-046 (the shared in-memory migrate+validate primitive). Grounding: analysis/2026-06-10-update-blocked-diagnostic-task-DRAFT.md user stories + R-0012.
